name: Plumbing Rough-In Pipeline
description: Eight-step plumbing pipeline strung from existing commands: seed setup → fixture placement → multi-service drops → penetration sweep → drainage sizing → trap/vent audit → backflow audit → stack capacity check.

steps.name: Build plumbing seed family
steps._notes: Generates STING_SEED_PlumbingFixture.rfa with 3-connector union (DCW/DHW/Sanitary) so AutoPipeDrop has terminals to wire to.

steps.name: Place fixtures from room rules
steps._notes: FixturePlacementEngine reads STING_PLACEMENT_RULES + room types. WC / basin / shower / urinal / sink land at the right wall positions per BS 6465.

steps.name: Auto-drop pipes (cold + hot + soil)
steps._notes: AutoPipeDrop runs once per fixture connector — 2-3 drops per WC/basin/sink. AutoDropCommand triggers SlabPenetrationDetector + WallPenetrationDetector + BeamPenetrationDetector + FrpPenetrationPlacer in the same transaction.

steps.name: Auto-size drainage (BS EN 12056-2 / IPC 2021)
steps._notes: DfuMap → DrainageSizer → VentDesigner → SlopeAutoCorrector. Sets DN on each soil run.

steps.name: Run full validator suite
steps._notes: Includes PenetrationCoverageValidator so any plumbing run that crossed a fire-rated barrier without a placed FRP shows up in the dashboard.
